scope: Implement deliberation governance v2.7 end-to-end on legacy LifeOS spine and factory-staging
Nine Neon tables: roster, consensus, scorecard, hist, cfo, evidence_vault, gate, founder_debriefs, rep_catalog
Production API at /api/v1/lifeos/deliberation/* including pipeline seed/finalize and Founder Debrief
Factory BPB intake deliberation gate + mission auto-seed
Council /build deliberation seed before codegen and finalize after commit
Gate-change Position E/K synthesis round with auto-persist
A→Z smoke script for factory local + optional Railway API
non_goals: Founder Debrief push to FM/Lumin chat overlay
Global TSOS→CFO rename across all legacy services
Claim FULLY_MACHINE_READY for entire factory reboot
success_criteria: All blueprint step targets exist and pass node --check where applicable
SENTRY audit does not certify partial work as complete
Load-bearing builds fail closed when consensus missing
BPB+CDR session law: two model slots when both authorities present
failure_criteria: Deliberation gate passable without Hist case or CFO receipt
Lens or C2 terminology reintroduced in new deliberation code
Docs claim LIVE/PROVEN without smoke receipt
tradeoffs: Legacy spine GAP-FILL vs factory-staging canonical runtime — both wired for parity
Reverse-BP (code then formalize BP) vs strict BP-first — documented for comparison

escalation.rule: blockers route CDR → BPB → ChC → Adam; load_bearing requires consensus session
